title: Hypocrisy
content:
Hypocrisy will serve as well
    To propagate a church, as zeal;
    As persecution and promotion
    Do equally advance devotion:
    So round white stones will serve, they say,
    As well as eggs to make hens lay.
meaning:
"Hypocrisy" is a quintessential example of Samuel Butler's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
